message:
fix: move BruteGpuIndex to demo, remove /gpu package export (#5)

BruteGpuIndex is a demo-only benchmark baseline, not an npm consumer
concern. The /gpu export caused CI to fail because the demo installed
turboquant-wasm from npm (old version without /gpu).

- Move BruteGpuIndex + brute shader into demo/src/search/brute-gpu.ts
- Remove "turboquant-wasm/gpu" package export
- Remove brute-dot-batch.wgsl from npm package source
- Demo imports from local file instead of package
